mapper.select:
select * from course
and (courseName like concat('%', #{courseName}, '%') or courseCode like concat('%', #{courseName}, '%'))
order by courseCode asc
mapper.insert: insert into course(id, courseName, courseCode, credit, description) values (#{id}, #{courseName}, #{courseCode}, #{credit}, #{description})
mapper.select: select c.*, GROUP_CONCAT(ct.teacher_name SEPARATOR '、') as teacherName from course c left join course_teacher ct on c.id = ct.course_id where c.id = #{id} group by c.id
